docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEMMING, FITZ, D. II AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, NEAL DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEMMING, FITZ, D. II SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-13-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-19-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEMMING, FITZ, D. II SERVED JAN-19-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, NEAL
JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 02:55PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. D.HYDE FOR THE PLTF AND R.DAVIS FOR THE DEFT. CASE IS SETTLED.TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURRAY, NEAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 271 WALLER STREET $5,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E IS PERM IF DEFT MAINTAINS PAYMENT SCHEDULE AND PAYS ALL CURRENT RENTS. FAILURE TO PAY WILL LIFT THE STAY. UPON THE FULL COMPLIANCE, THE PLTF SHALL DISMISS THE CASE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
